dashboard.label: 🧩 Armis Roles
dashboard.description: Operational monitoring and permission visibility for Armis roles

search.query: index=$index$ sourcetype=armis_roles | spath path=name output=name | spath path=permissions.all output=permissions_all | spath path=permissions.advancedPermissions.all output=advanced_permissions_all | spath path=permissions.alert.all output=alert_all | spath path=permissions.alert.manage.all output=alert_manage_all | spath path=permissions.alert.read.all output=alert_read_all | spath path=permissions.business_applications.all output=business_applications_all | spath path=permissions.business_applications.manage.all output=business_applications_manage_all | spath path=permissions.business_applications.read.all output=business_applications_read_all | spath path=permissions.device.all output=device_all | spath path=permissions.device.manage.all output=device_manage_all | spath path=permissions.device.read.all output=device_read_all | spath path=permissions.risk_factor.all output=risk_factor_all | spath path=permissions.risk_factor.manage.all output=risk_factor_manage_all | spath path=permissions.risk_factor.read.all output=risk_factor_read_all | spath path=permissions.settings.all output=settings_all | spath path=permissions.user.all output=user_all | spath path=permissions.user.read.all output=user_read_all | spath path=permissions.vulnerability.all output=vulnerability_all | spath path=permissions.vulnerability.manage.all output=vulnerability_manage_all | spath path=permissions.vulnerability.read.all output=vulnerability_read_all
| stats count by name | sort name

| stats count(eval(permissions_all="true")) as global_permissions count(eval(advanced_permissions_all="true")) as advanced_permissions count(eval(alert_all="true")) as alert_permissions count(eval(business_applications_all="true")) as business_application_permissions count(eval(device_all="true")) as device_permissions count(eval(risk_factor_all="true")) as risk_factor_permissions count(eval(settings_all="true")) as settings_permissions count(eval(user_all="true")) as user_permissions count(eval(vulnerability_all="true")) as vulnerability_permissions | transpose 0 header_field="column" | rename column as "Permission Domain" "row 1" as "Role Count"

| stats count(eval(alert_all="true")) as alert_all count(eval(alert_manage_all="true")) as alert_manage count(eval(alert_read_all="true")) as alert_read | transpose 0 header_field="column" | rename column as "Alert Permission" "row 1" as "Role Count"

| stats count(eval(device_all="true")) as device_all count(eval(device_manage_all="true")) as device_manage count(eval(device_read_all="true")) as device_read | transpose 0 header_field="column" | rename column as "Device Permission" "row 1" as "Role Count"

| stats count(eval(vulnerability_all="true")) as vulnerability_all count(eval(vulnerability_manage_all="true")) as vulnerability_manage count(eval(vulnerability_read_all="true")) as vulnerability_read | transpose 0 header_field="column" | rename column as "Vulnerability Permission" "row 1" as "Role Count"

| sort name | table name permissions_all advanced_permissions_all alert_all alert_manage_all alert_read_all business_applications_all business_applications_manage_all business_applications_read_all device_all device_manage_all device_read_all risk_factor_all risk_factor_manage_all risk_factor_read_all settings_all user_all user_read_all vulnerability_all vulnerability_manage_all vulnerability_read_all
